Title: Karma
Summary: Invisible reputation deltas applied by game code when significant events fire.
Body:
## The shape

KarmaImpact carries Id, Description, and an array of KarmaDelta. Each KarmaDelta is just Faction (one of the four enum values) and Amount (clamped to -50..+100 by the runtime).

## How they fire

Karma impacts are applied from game code only. There is no authored cross reference from dialogs or quests to a KarmaImpact id; the firing happens in C# scripts. The editor authors KarmaImpact files in isolation so they exist for the runtime to look up.

The exception is on NPCs: an NPC carries DeathImpactId and DeathImpactIdContextual that fire when the NPC dies, conditioned on the ContextualFlag.

## What to do here

Open [Karma](/karma), pick an impact, and edit the deltas. The integrity check flags impacts referenced by an NPC that no longer exist, so renaming an impact id is a two step move (rename in the karma file, then update the referencing NPCs).
